final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between a set of AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a labeled node with definition snippets, connected by relationship lines/arrows showing how concepts relate to one another
Subject: must include all 7 concepts:
  1. AI
  2. MCP
  3. AI Agent
  4. OpenClaw
  5. AI Skill
  6. 蒸馏
  7. CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable educational atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs a light, easy-to-read direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface treatment — exact paper texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include the following labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept nodes with visible definitions and relationship connectors between them; layout must be readable and visually organized
Avoid:
